ValidationRule.description: When Priority for Unit Download Review is set to High or Critical a justification is required.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = "NATT_Service_Engineering_Field_Service", RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTM_Service_Engineering_Field_Service"), ISPICKVAL(Type, "Unit Download Review"), OR(ISPICKVAL(Priority, "High"),ISPICKVAL(Priority, "Critical")), NATT_Unit_Download_Priority_Just__c = "" )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You must add a justification if the Priority for Unit Download Review is High or Critical
